signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.34 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; BoJ meeting on 28 Apr. JPY COT LF short −65,309 (crowded carry). Intervention risk on a break above 160.00; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.7152 — HV30 at 8.2%, ATM IV at 9.4%. CFTC LF net long +41,675, WoW delta −1,101; AM not reducing. Positioning stalling — late-trend caution signal.

signals.title: EUR — G8 Outperformance
signals.text: EUR leads G8 laggards (+0.873% spread) — EUR −0.471% vs CAD +0.402%. EUR underperformance vs peers; BoE, ECB meetings loom.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: GBP/USD at 1.3521 — BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral. GBP LF net long +28,426; AM constructive. ATM IV 9.5% near HV; 25d RR flat — options neutral.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −17,090 vs RBNZ hike 100% priced for 27 May. Short-squeeze risk elevated if RBNZ delivers hike; NZD/USD at 0.5881. Carry advantage favors NZD with RBNZ 2.25% vs SNB 0% — 225bp.
